blended.narrative: Mount St. Louis Moonstone is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,047 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 47°F.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
